name: codeforge
description: + CFP-2412 (2026-06-25) — whitelist↔manifest↔templates 3-way 일관성 CI gate 신설 (Epic CFP-2394 Story D, 최종): consumer-applicability 삼각 일관성(whitelist 28 ↔ templates/github-workflows/ ↔ manifest 49 closure) warning-tier CI gate. 방향1(whitelist→templates 실존 전수 miss=FAIL) + 방향2(manifest dep→whitelist subset) + 방향3(whitelist→manifest closure-asset 등재완전성, AM-3 run:-block-aware 추출) + depth-2(hard-exit 데이터 dep). graceful=data-absence 스크립트 EXIT 0(path-filter/on.paths skip 금지=required Pending trap 회피) + setup-error fail-closed exit 2. check_whitelist_manifest_3way.py Python SSOT(ReDoS-safe) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow(injection-safe pull_request) + 15 fixture discriminating test(mutation 생존 0). evidence-checks-registry 77→78 + label-registry-v2 v2.98→v2.99(hotfix-bypass:whitelist-manifest-3way 99 member). 신규 ADR 0(ADR-130 §결정3 closure ENFORCEMENT 적용). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.36.0 → 6.37.0 MINOR (신규 governance lint gate 활성화 = governance behavior, ADR-037 (d)). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2408 (2026-06-25) — consumer-applicability full closure manifest 등록 (Epic CFP-2394 Story B): consumer-applicable workflow 의 full closure(scripts+데이터+정책doc)를 templates/consumer-scripts.manifest 에 등록(16→49 entry, additions-only). Check 4 확장자-인지 면제(.tsv 데이터/.mjs import-only ESM 의 exec-bit 면제 + 이중확장 .sh.tsv 류 strict 우선 방어) + 22 script git index mode +x normalize + 6 fixture mutation-kill. ADR-130 closure-완전성 규칙(§결정5-A 채널=templates/github-workflows) 적용. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경. 6.35.0 → 6.36.0 MINOR (consumer 33 script 추가 배포 + Check 4 면제 runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2383 (2026-06-20) — spawn-prompt-fact-verify 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 37 §결정 1 layer 1 sub-scope 1-Z, sub-scope 1-L CFP-1590 carrier): worker→worker handoff spawn prompt PR-body-proxy 안 C1-C5 fact category (C1 counter / C2 version / C3 SHA / C4 verify-result / C5 file-existence) inherit fact 단언 시 동일-window [verified-via:] annotation presence lint (warning-tier). 4 sub-source inherit fact (사용자 발화 / sibling Issue body / sister PR commit message / 별 carrier retro file). 삭제된 1-W source (c84fadf3) C1-C5 PATTERNS 이식 + S2 (CFP-2382) issue-body-claim-pre-screen 구조 답습 (line-by-line in_fence toggle + strip_inline_code + PER_BLOCK_SCAN_CAP=50 + ANNOTATION_MARKER 정적 substring + exit 0=PASS/1=FLAG/2=SETUP) + PR-event trigger (pull_request opened/synchronize/reopened, tier-downgrade-guard.yml 선례 답습 — carrier workflow = spawn-prompt-fact-verify.yml). check_spawn_prompt_fact_verify.py Python SSOT (ReDoS-safe anchored bounded-quantifier regex, nested quantifier 0) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow + self-contained discriminating test. injection-safe (pull_request NOT pull_request_target / permissions contents:read,pull-requests:read / env-injection only — run inline 보간 금지, fork-PR shell injection 차단). PR-body-proxy 한계 명시 (실 spawn prompt 아닌 proxy, transcribe 케이스만 검출) → warning-tier advisory (위조 false-PASS 구조적 가능, 보안 통제 신뢰 금지). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변) + label-registry-v2 v2.98 MINOR (hotfix-bypass:spawn-prompt-fact-verify 115번째 family member, 1-W name 충돌 회피). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.33.0 → 6.34.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2382 (2026-06-20) — issue-body-claim-pre-screen 게이트 mechanical wire (ADR-082 Amendment 20 §결정 15, CFP-1559 carrier): orchestrator-authored followup Issue body 안 4 sub-pattern (PR state / CFP state / count / sister carrier) stale-claim 을 동일-line [verified-via:] annotation presence 로 write-time pre-screen (warning-tier). Wave 1 declarative anchor(CFP-1559)의 Wave 2 wire. check_issue_body_claim_pre_screen.py Python SSOT (line-by-line in_fence toggle masking + inline code-span strip — fenced 내부 빈줄 fragmentation 0, ReDoS-safe anchored regex) + thin wrapper + .github single-root workflow (on:issues opened/edited, R1 scope predicate = codeforge-improvement AND (type:improvement OR title [CFP-FU/[CFP][FU), story-init.yml 답습) + self-contained discriminating test (23 TC, mutation 생존 0). count enum 한글 확장 (건/개/곳/줄/회/어휘 — ordinal-모호 번/항목/차례 제외, FP 보수) + 구조화 FLAG message (pattern/line/claim/hint). registry entry status deferred-followup → Active flip (current_tier:warning 불변). required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.32.0 → 6.33.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2381 (2026-06-20) — deferred-followup reconcile 게이트 (ADR-060 Amendment 18 §결정 32): §결정 19 auto_blocking 라벨의 mechanical forcing function 신설. '임계 초과 + auto_blocking + 전용 carrier 부재' evidence-checks-registry entry 자동 검출 + 강제 action 3택 (배선/강등/폐기, warning-tier). carrier-부재 = detect_command OR workflow 경로 파일 ABSENT (닫힌집합 + fail-loud 경로추출, status-agnostic broad criterion, 2-root parity). self-validation test job (다형 fixture mutation 생존 0) + STALE 2 status flip (bootstrap-labels-precondition + schema-change-7-principles-self-check) + 16번째 registry self-entry. required 신설 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-127 ratchet). 6.31.0 → 6.32.0 MINOR (신규 lint runtime 활성화 = governance behavior). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). + CFP-2377 (2026-06-20) — 완료 단계 정식화 (ADR-128 + ADR-040 Amd9 + ADR-045 Amd13): merge 직후 wrap-up 을 정식 '완료 단계' 로 격상. (갭 A) backstop GC 자동 트리거 복원 = hooks.json SessionEnd async dispatch 단일 wire (hooks/session-end → check-worktree-stale.sh background GC, 문서-실배선 drift 복원 — SessionStart async 무시·동기 지연 회귀라 배제, 트리거 단일화 invariant = Stop 동시 wire 금지) + phase:완료 worktree-clean self-check 신규 (scripts/check-worktree-completion-clean.sh, eager 미실행 검출 게이트, F2 sub-worktree vs Story root mergedAt 구분 계약, fail-safe 4종 상속, warning-tier + workflow:null local-only — required CI 불가). (갭 B) 4-트리거 (post-merge-followup / retro-mandatory / GitOpsAgent eager / phase:완료) 수렴 SSOT = playbook §9.7.2 명문화 (신규 SSOT 0, 클라우드↔로컬 비대칭 = 절차+텔레메트리 조합). (갭 C) Living Architecture / Confluence mirror 재정합 = 유예 (ADR-112/111 owner pointer). 신규 lane 0 / required check 0 / branch protection 6-tuple 무변경 (ADR-024 Amd19 §B 정합) / process-skip 채널 0 (ADR-127 ratchet 정합). 6.30.0 → 6.31.0 MINOR (SessionEnd hook 신규 + 완료-게이트 기능). marketplace version sync(ADR-063). Claude Code 범용 SW 개발 오케스트레이션 플러그인. 0 core 에이전트 (wrapper-only) · 8 레인 + CI gate + role:dev 동적 roster 로 요구사항 접수부터 배포 리뷰 통과까지 자율 실행
